zh.lifeSummary: 當Goswin II. von Heinsberg-Valkenburg於1102年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格瓦瑟格時，他的父親Goswin I. von Heinsberg-Valkenburg42歲，母親Oda von Walbeck32歲。他於1135年與Adelheid von Sommerschenburg結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1168年4月8日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格海斯格享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Goswin II. von Heinsberg-Valkenburg于1102年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格瓦瑟格时，他的父亲Goswin I. von Heinsberg-Valkenburg42岁，母亲Oda von Walbeck32岁。他于1135年与Adelheid von Sommerschenburg结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1168年4月8日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格海斯格享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Goswin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old English personal name Godwine, derived from god ‘god’ + wine ‘friend’. This was borne in the 11th century by the Earl of Wessex, the most important man in England after the king. He was an influential adviser to successive kings of England, and father of the King Harold who was defeated at Hastings in 1066 . The personal name continued in use after the Norman Conquest long enough to give rise to a surname. Modern use as a given name is probably a transferred use of the surname, rather than a revival of the Old English name.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Goswin II. von Heinsberg-Valkenburg was born in 1102, in Wassenberg, Heinsberg, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Goswin I. von Heinsberg-Valkenburg, was 42 and his mother, Oda von Walbeck, was 32. He married Adelheid von Sommerschenburg in 1135. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 8 April 1168, in Heinsberg, Heinsberg, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Goswin II. von Heinsberg-Valkenburg est né en 1102, à Wassenberg, Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Goswin I. von Heinsberg-Valkenburg, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Oda von Walbeck, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Adelheid von Sommerschenburg en 1135. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1168, à Heinsberg, Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 66 ans.

Er hat 1135 Adelheid von Sommerschenburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 8. ko.lifeSummary: Goswin II. von Heinsberg-Valkenburg(이)가 1102년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 하인스버그 와센버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Goswin I. von Heinsberg-Valkenburg(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Oda von Walbeck(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1135년 Adelheid von Sommerschenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1168년 4월 8일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 하인스버그 하인스버그에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Groitzsch, Leipziger Land, Landkreis Lei: гроицщ, крис липзигир ланд, сачсен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Goswin II. von Heinsberg-Valkenburg родился в 1102 г. в местности вассенбирг, хаинсбирг, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Goswin I. von Heinsberg-Valkenburg было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Oda von Walbeck, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelheid von Sommerschenburg в 1135 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 8 апреля 1168 г. в местности хаинсбирг, хаинсбирг, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 66 лет.

Se casó con Adelheid von Sommerschenburg en 1135. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 8 de abril de 1168, en Heinsberg, Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 66 años.
